digests.title: TLDR Daily Digest
digests.tagline: Tech, AI, IT, Web Dev, InfoSec, DevOps, Design

stories.headline: Google Gemini 3.5 Pro Delayed as Coding Performance Falls Short
stories.blurb: Google's next-gen AI model is months behind schedule, particularly in coding, frustrating teams and raising fears of losing ground to competitors.

stories.headline: Kimi K3: 2.8 Trillion Parameter Open Model Released
stories.blurb: Moonshot launched a multimodal model with 1M context window and plans to release open weights on July 27, positioning it as a major open-source contender.

stories.headline: OpenAI Trains GPT‑Red to Automatically Audit and Harden Models Against Attacks
stories.blurb: GPT‑Red runs automated prompt injections against internal models and live agents, then uses those attacks to make GPT‑5.x more robust without hurting capabilities.

stories.headline: Schema Harness Helps Frontier Models Score 99% on ARC‑AGI‑3 Benchmark
stories.blurb: By treating each game environment as an executable program to model and test, Schema enables agents to achieve near-perfect accuracy on the challenging abstraction and reasoning corpus.

stories.headline: CISA Orders Immediate Patching of Three Actively Exploited SharePoint Vulnerabilities
stories.blurb: The agency warns that on-premises SharePoint servers are under attack and that patching alone may not fully remove attacker persistence.

stories.headline: Millions of Shark Robot Vacuums Exposed to Remote Control and Surveillance
stories.blurb: Misconfigured AWS IoT Core policies allow attackers to take over devices, steal Wi‑Fi passwords and house maps, and watch live camera feeds; no patch after months.

stories.headline: TuxBot v3 IoT Botnet Uses LLM-Assisted Development to Evade Defenses
stories.blurb: Unit 42 details a botnet with seven persistence mechanisms, encrypted peer-to-peer fallbacks, and AI‑generated exploits, linked to the Keksec ecosystem.

stories.headline: OAuth Client ID Spoofing Enables Stealthy Account Enumeration in Microsoft Entra ID
stories.blurb: Attackers use spoofed client IDs to trick Azure AD into revealing valid usernames and password validity through differential error codes without generating sign-in logs.

stories.headline: Bun Completes 11‑Day Rewrite from Zig to Rust Using 64 AI Agents
stories.blurb: The $165,000 migration of 535,000 lines of code with Claude Fable demonstrates AI is now cost‑effective for major codebase migrations when projects are well‑engineered.

stories.headline: Slack’s Shipyard Brings Immutable Deployments and Progressive Rollouts to EC2
stories.blurb: The platform replaces long-lived patched instances with hardened golden images, bringing modern container‑like practices to legacy EC2 workloads.

stories.headline: Turso Builds a Modern Postgres‑Compatible Database in Rust Called Limbo
stories.blurb: Limbo aims to revamp PostgreSQL’s architecture with async I/O, modular storage, and a simpler codebase for easier extensibility and cloud‑native deployment.

stories.headline: Double Neural Bypass with AI Restores Hand Movement and Touch in Paralyzed Man
stories.blurb: Researchers combined a brain-computer interface, AI, and spinal stimulation to produce long-lasting recovery in a patient paralysed from the chest down.

stories.headline: iPhone 18 Pro Leaks Point to a Larger, Heavier Design with 2nm Chip and Variable Aperture
stories.blurb: Rumors suggest a refined Dynamic Island, faster A20 Pro, variable‑aperture main camera, larger battery, and a likely price increase to $1,199–$1,299.

stories.headline: Facebook’s Design Drift from Chronological Feed to Algorithmic Engagement Erodes Trust
stories.blurb: The gradual shift from user‑controlled to engagement-optimized feed, combined with feature fragmentation, shows how products can regress through small, reasonable decisions.
